caption: A person is crafting handmade birthday cards on a white tabletop with a gridded cutting mat. A brown card is positioned at the top, featuring a floral pattern and a white sentiment tag that reads "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL the best things". To the right, a blue tape runner and several pieces of floral-patterned and textured cream paper are visible. The person, wearing a white wristband and a smartwatch, uses their hands to arrange and align the paper components. As the sequence progresses, they move a stack of cream and green patterned card bases into place beneath the main brown card. In the bottom frames, the person's hands actively slide and position the card bases. A small logo reading "Stampin' Up!" is visible in the bottom left corner of the final frames.
